message:
fix(sync/once_cell): use AcqRel ordering on CAS to pair with InitGuard Release

All four compare_exchange_weak(UNINIT, INITIALIZING, ...) sites used
Ordering::Release for the success case. The CAS winner needs Acquire
semantics to pair with the Release store in InitGuard::drop when a
previous initializer was cancelled. On ARM/POWER (non-TSO), the new
initializer could observe stale pre-cancellation state. Benign on x86
due to TSO but incorrect per the C++ memory model.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
